name: Coffee Cake Muffins (Jvn)
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------SPICE MIX---------------------------------
1/2 cup Packed brown sugar
2 tablespoons Flour
1 teaspoon Cinnamon
Spice mix: stir together.
Batter: Mix dry ingredients and make a well. Cream butter, sugar, and egg. Add yoghurt, milk, and vanilla. Pour into the well and stir to moisten. Fill greased muffin tins 1/3 full with batter. Sprinkle with spice mix. Cover with more batter, filling to 2/3 full. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes.
Variations:
: 1. Decorate or glaze while hot with a simple icing made from powdered sugar and a little liquid.
: 2. Replace some or all of vanilla extract with another extract such as almond.
: 3. For a crunchy top, place half of the spice mix inside the muffins, and the rest on top before baking.
: 4. Replace some or all of cinnamon with other spices such as nutmeg.
: 5. Sprinkle a small amount of finely grated citrus peel over the first layer of batter before the spice mix.
: 6. Use rum or another liquor instead of vanilla extract.
This recipe has been rewritten to maintain clarity and consistency while adhering strictly to your specified rules.
